=====================================================
          VET-TECH MATH MASTER: FINAL PREP
=====================================================
Built by: Justin Davis
For: RVT Student Final Exam Study (Weeks 1-12)

This is a portable version of the Study Tool. 
No installation is required.

-----------------------------------------------------
HOW TO RUN THE APP:
-----------------------------------------------------
1. Extract (Unzip) the entire folder to your Desktop.
   (IMPORTANT: Do not try to run it from inside the ZIP file).

2. Open the folder and find the "app.exe" file.

3. Double-click "app.exe".
   - A black terminal window will open. This is the server. 
   - DO NOT close this window while you are studying.

4. Once the window says "Running on http://127.0.0.1:5000", 
   open your web browser (Chrome, Safari, or Edge).

5. Type the following into your address bar and hit Enter:
   http://127.0.0.1:5000

-----------------------------------------------------
FEATURES INCLUDED:
-----------------------------------------------------
- 📅 Study Roadmap (Weeks 1-2, 3, 6, 8, 9)
- 🧮 Step-by-Step Dose Solver (with Dimensional Analysis)
- 📝 50-Question Practice Bank
- 🔥 15-Question Final Exam Sprint (10-Minute Timer)
- 📖 Searchable Formula Cheat Sheet

-----------------------------------------------------
TROUBLESHOOTING:
-----------------------------------------------------
- If Windows Defender shows a warning: Click "More Info" -> "Run Anyway."
- If the page won't load: Ensure the black terminal window is still open.
- To close the app: Simply close the terminal window.

Good luck on Wednesday!
=====================================================
